name: Connection
description: A configured connection from an integration platform to a third-party SaaS, database, or API provider on behalf of a specific tenant. Connections encapsulate the credentials, scopes, and runtime state that an iPaaS, embedded-iPaaS, unified API, or data pipeline uses to invoke the underlying provider.

id.description: Stable identifier for the connection assigned by the integration platform.

provider.description: Slug of the upstream provider being connected to.

category.description: Business category of the upstream provider.

tenant_id.description: Identifier of the customer or workspace that owns this connection.

authentication.description: Authentication configuration used by the connection.

scopes.description: Granted OAuth scopes or permission strings.

expires_at.description: Expiration timestamp for the current access token.

status.description: Current health status of the connection.

platform.description: Integration platform that owns this connection.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the connection was first established.

last_synced_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent successful sync or API call using this connection.

metadata.description: Free-form metadata captured from the upstream provider during connection.
